description_long: This is an adult male figure dressed in period Western attire, featuring a wide-brimmed hat, a fitted vest over a long-sleeved shirt, and high-waisted trousers tucked into tall boots. The shirt has loose sleeves and the vest is buttoned, giving a formal yet rugged appearance. The face is partially obscured by a bandana or scarf, adding an element of anonymity and protection from dust. The boots are sturdy and reach up to the mid-calf, suitable for walking on rough terrain. The overall silhouette is slim and upright, with arms slightly outstretched. The clothing style and accessories suggest a historical or Western urban context, such as a 19th-century street or frontier town.
description: An adult male in Western-style attire with a wide-brimmed hat, vest, long-sleeved shirt, and tall boots, face partially covered by a bandana.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide-brimmed hat, buttoned vest, long-sleeved shirt, and bandana covering the lower face.
description_view_1: Front-side view highlighting the fitted vest, arm position, and the side profile of the hat and boots.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the vest, shirt, and the tall boots, with the hat's brim visible from behind.
description_view_3: Back-side view showing the side and rear of the hat, vest, and boots, with the bandana partially visible.
attribute_clothing_type: Western-style outfit with a wide-brimmed hat, buttoned vest, long-sleeved shirt, high-waisted trousers, and tall boots
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms slightly outstretched
attribute_hairstyle: short hair mostly covered by hat
